characters.name: Papa Sol
characters.description: Proud handsome seahorse father in deep warm orange with golden speckles, rounded belly pouch, long elegant snout, beautiful fan-like dorsal fin
uniqueFeatures: Deep WARM ORANGE body color with GOLDEN SPECKLES that shimmer — his signature look
ROUNDED belly pouch — prominently visible, his defining feature as the baby-carrier
LONG elegant snout — refined and distinguished
Beautiful FAN-LIKE dorsal fin — wide and delicate
SHORTER than Mama Pearl — stockier, more compact build
Curly PREHENSILE tail — always gripping something
characters.personality: Gentle and patient — often seen rocking gently, always counting babies, warm and protective
characters.notLike: NOT as tall or slender as Mama Pearl, NOT pink like Mama, NOT tiny like babies Coral and Bubbles

characters.name: Mama Pearl
characters.description: Graceful seahorse mother in shimmering rose-pink with pearlescent white highlights, slightly taller than Papa, delicate almost-transparent fins
uniqueFeatures: Shimmering ROSE-PINK body — clearly different from Papa's orange
PEARLESCENT WHITE highlights running along her ridges like tiny opals
SLIGHTLY TALLER than Papa Sol — elegant and elongated build
Delicate ALMOST-TRANSPARENT fins — catch light like stained glass windows
Graceful curved posture — always poised and elegant
More SLENDER build than Papa — no belly pouch
characters.personality: Elegant and loving — moves with flowing grace, always initiating the morning dance, affectionate
characters.notLike: NOT orange like Papa Sol, NOT stocky or round-bellied like Papa, NOT tiny like babies

characters.name: Coral
characters.description: Tiny baby seahorse in bright sunny yellow with baby-pink spots, enormous round curious eyes, always curling tail around things
uniqueFeatures: Bright SUNNY YELLOW body — vivid and warm like sunshine
A few BABY-PINK SPOTS scattered across body — cute freckle-like markings
ENORMOUS round curious eyes — disproportionately large, always wide open
TINY size — much much smaller than both parents
Tail always CURLING around something — seagrass, coral, other tails
Lively energetic posture — leaning forward, always exploring
characters.personality: Curious and adventurous — first to explore, always pointing snout at new things, excitable
characters.notLike: NOT purple like Bubbles, NOT round like Bubbles, much SMALLER than parents, NOT orange or pink

characters.name: Bubbles
characters.description: Slightly rounder baby seahorse in soft lavender-purple with white belly, tall coronet, shy, always gripping Papa's tail
uniqueFeatures: Soft LAVENDER-PURPLE body color — distinctly different from yellow Coral
WHITE BELLY — visible contrast against the purple
Distinctively TALL CORONET on head — the crown-like bump is her signature feature
Slightly ROUNDER build than Coral — chubbier, softer shape
SHY posture — often partially hidden behind Papa's tail
TINY size — same generation as Coral, much smaller than parents
characters.personality: Shy and sweet — always gripping Papa's tail, peeks out cautiously, gentle and quiet
characters.notLike: NOT yellow like Coral, NOT as bold or forward-leaning as Coral, NOT orange like Papa, NOT pink like Mama

step3.styleDescription:
Pixar-quality 3D rendering. Smooth, rounded forms with subsurface scattering on skin. Expressive character animation with large soulful eyes. Rich saturated colors. Photorealistic textures but stylized proportions. Professional children's book illustration quality. Cinematic lighting with warm key light and cool fill.

Emphasis on light passing through materials — translucent ears, glowing skin edges, light shining through leaves/water/ice. Subsurface scattering cranked up. Back-lit subjects with ethereal glow.

Rich botanical detail filling the frame — individually rendered leaves, visible bark texture, dewdrops on petals, moss on stones, flowers in full bloom. Nature as living wallpaper.
